mapper.select: SELECT order_no, plate_no, driver_name, departure_name, destination_name, depart_time, estimated_arrival, actual_arrival, transport_status, loading_temp, temp_upper, temp_lower FROM t_cc_transport WHERE prod_batch_no = #{prodBatchNo} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY depart_time DESC

SELECT order_no, plate_no, driver_name, departure_name, destination_name, depart_time, estimated_arrival, actual_arrival, transport_status, loading_temp, temp_upper, temp_lower FROM t_cc_transport WHERE product_name = #{productName} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY depart_time DESC

SELECT order_no, plate_no, driver_name, departure_name, destination_name, depart_time, estimated_arrival, actual_arrival, transport_status, loading_temp, temp_upper, temp_lower FROM t_cc_transport WHERE raw_batch_no = #{rawBatchNo} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY depart_time DESC
